gap_1_usage_subcategory_detection.details: Added PauseStateManager.USAGE_SUB_REASONS with 4 sub-categories + unknown fallback. Added detect_usage_sub_reason() sentinel-based detection. Added classify_usage_exhaustion() fail-closed classification. Updated set_pause() to auto-classify. Updated api_automode_loop.check_usage_exhaustion() to use sub-category detection.

gap_2_telegram_dedup.details: Added TelegramNotifier._make_fingerprint() for deterministic fingerprinting. Added _is_duplicate() with 5-minute DEDUP_WINDOW_SECONDS. Updated send_pause_notification() and send_usage_exhausted_notification() to dedup. Dedup failure does not block pause (fail-closed).

gap_3_pre_resume_rtc_validity.details: Added PauseStateManager._check_rtc_validity() checking: truth source exists, not synthetic, required formal body fields present, not stale (>7 days). Integrated into pre_resume_checks(). Malformed/missing/stale RTC blocks resume.

gap_4_pre_resume_pause_reason_resolution.details: Added PauseStateManager._check_pause_reason_resolved() checking: sentinel cleared for usage sub-categories, user override evidence for unknown_usage_exhaustion. Non-usage pauses bypass. Integrated into pre_resume_checks(). Unresolved pause reason blocks resume.
